description:
★Leave me to die★

SUICIDAL ATTEMPTS ⚠️

I don't want to hear any complaints about mixed gender so I'm going to say this now. When you open the bit, at the top of the very first message it will say either Fem POV, Male POV, or Nonbinary. If you see that the bot is using fonts than just regenerate the message because it will start talking gibberish lol. If there are any other problems I will fix them as soon as possible. Enjoy Pookies :3
